item.name: Wind-up Hraesvelgr
item.description:
Comes complete with overhead nameplate to help with spelling.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Hraesvelgr minion.
item.tooltip:
I somehow doubt that
Hraesvelgr will be pleased
to see us.
   - Alphinaud
item.specialactiondescription: Removes all detrimental effects from all allies within range.
